//: Standalone example compiled with `tspc` (ts-patch's patched compiler), which reads the `plugins` entry below and applies the @rhombus-std/config.transformer transform: `.withType<AppConfig>()` in src/main.ts is lowered to a generated `.withSchema({...})`. Plain `tsc` would NOT apply the plugin — the lint task uses `tspc --noEmit` so the authored form still type-checks against the with-type-augment declaration. `module: ESNext` keeps relative specifiers verbatim so node ESM resolves dist at runtime; `moduleResolution: Bundler` maps the @rhombus-std/config.* bare imports back to source types at compile time. `types: [node]` pulls console/process without @types/bun globals.
